tabs.label: Keyword Research
tabs.title: Find the Keywords Your Competitors Are Missing
tabs.text: RankPilot surfaces high-opportunity keywords your competitors rank for but you don't, grouped into topic clusters ready for your content calendar.

tabs.label: Content Briefs
tabs.title: Generate AI Briefs That Writers Actually Use
tabs.text: Every brief includes target keywords, recommended headings, word count, competitor references, and internal link suggestions, all generated in seconds.

tabs.label: Rank Tracking
tabs.title: Monitor Every Keyword Across Every Market
tabs.text: Track daily ranking changes for all your target keywords, see SERP feature ownership, and get alerts when positions shift so you can act fast.

tabs.label: Content Audit
tabs.title: Find and Fix Underperforming Content Fast
tabs.text: RankPilot scans your entire site, flags pages losing traffic, identifies cannibalization issues, and prioritizes exactly which articles to update first.

tabs.label: GEO Optimization
tabs.title: Optimize Content for AI Overviews and Generative Search
tabs.text: Score your pages on clarity, structure, and extractability, the three signals that determine whether your content gets cited in Google AI Overviews.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale when you're ready. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts.

items.q: 1. How is RankPilot different from other SEO tools?
items.a: RankPilot is the only platform that covers the full SEO content lifecycle in one workflow: keyword research, competitor analysis, AI content briefs, rank tracking, content auditing, and GEO optimization. Most tools do one or two of these well. RankPilot does all of them.

items.q: 2. Do I need technical SEO knowledge to use RankPilot?
items.a: No. RankPilot is built for content marketers, writers, and growth teams, not just SEO specialists. The platform guides you through every step and explains what actions to take and why.

items.q: 3. Can I connect my Google Search Console account?
items.a: Yes. RankPilot integrates directly with Google Search Console to surface near-jump opportunities, track impressions and clicks, and identify pages that are close to ranking on page one.

items.q: 4. What happens when I reach my plan's keyword limit?
items.a: You will retain full access to all your existing data and projects. Additional keyword lookups and advanced features will pause until you upgrade your plan or your monthly limit resets.

items.q: 5. Does RankPilot support multiple websites or client accounts?
items.a: Yes. The Professional and Enterprise plans support unlimited projects, making RankPilot ideal for agencies managing multiple client sites. Enterprise includes white-label reporting and dedicated account management.

integrations.title: Works With Your Existing Stack
integrations.subtitle: RankPilot connects with the tools your team already uses, so your workflow stays uninterrupted.
